author: vrytfmcat
description: Schedule coupons, groceries, shopping reminders, and recurring activities in a calendar. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: vryTfmcat
manifest.description: Schedule coupons, groceries, shopping reminders, and recurring activities in a calendar.
manifest.name: Coupon Scheduler

name: Coupon Scheduler

releases.author: vryTfmcat
releases.description:
Fixes Obsidian 1.6 compatibility by replacing the newer revealLeaf API.

Updates the build configuration to use Node's built-in module list instead of the deprecated builtin-modules package.
releases.name: Coupon Scheduler 1.0.1

releases.author: vryTfmcat
releases.description:
Initial community release.

- Plan coupons, groceries, shopping reminders, red packets, and recurring activities.
- Use day, week, and month calendar views.
- Keep records in the trash and import or export JSON backups.
- Work entirely offline with no telemetry or external network requests.
releases.name: Coupon Scheduler 1.0.0
